title: Benefits Enrollment: Health and Dental Insurance
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health and dental insurance benefits?
A: To enroll in health and dental insurance benefits, you must complete the enrollment process during the open enrollment period or within 30 days of your hire date. You will receive an email with instructions and a link to the online benefits portal where you can select your preferred plans. Our company offers several health insurance options, including HMO and PPO plans, as well as a comprehensive dental plan. If you have any questions about the plans or need assistance, you can contact the HR department or our benefits administrator. Remember to review your selections carefully before submitting, as changes can only be made during the next open enrollment period unless you experience a qualifying life event. Once enrolled, your coverage will begin on the first day of the following month.
